headline: Shares of critical metals companies are trading higher after Iran said the Strait of Hormuz would remain open for the duration of the ceasefire, softening the U.S. dollar.
summary: Shares of critical metals companies are trading higher after Iran said the Strait of Hormuz would remain open for the duration of the ceasefire, softening the U.S. dollar.
